allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial Brain Trainer app

- Dark theme mobile-first design
- 5 question categories: Probability, TVM, Game Theory, Stats, Combinatorics
- 40+ question templates with random variations
- Immediate feedback with explanations
- Streak tracking with local storage
- Category filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Mental Math category with 25 finance-focused drills

- Quick multiplication/division
- Percentage calculations \(of amount, change\)
- Basis points conversions
- Per-share and market cap calcs
- Multiples and margins
- MOIC/IRR approximations
- Dilution and ownership math
- CAC/LTV calculations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Library section - personal knowledge base

Features:
- Train/Library mode toggle
- Folder system \(create, rename, delete\)
- Add content via: paste text, upload file \(PDF/TXT/MD\), paste URL
- URL fetching with content extraction
- Full-screen reading view
- localStorage persistence
- Dark theme consistent with Train section

New files:
- library.js - all Library logic
- library.css - Library-specific styles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add PWA support, Daily Drill, and AI features

- Service worker for offline support
- Web app manifest for install-to-home-screen
- Library section for personal knowledge base
- Daily Drill with spaced repetition \(SM-2\)
- Optional AI question generation and grading
- Anthropic API integration \(user provides key\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add 4 new calculation-based stats questions

- Portfolio Weighted Return \(3 assets, randomized weights/returns\)
- Altman Z-Score Component \(5 components, randomized ratios\)
- Regression to Mean Margin Forecasting \(industry avg, std dev, reversion\)
- Poker Outs to Equity \(Rule of 2 and 4, common draw scenarios\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Poker GTO category with 11 questions + 8 Library folders

New category: poker_gto with 11 question templates:
1. Preflop Position Decision \(RFI ranges\)
2. 3-Bet or Call or Fold Response
3. Bluff Frequency Calculation
4. Minimum Defense Frequency \(MDF\)
5. Pot Odds + Required Equity
6. Blocker Identification
7. Range Advantage Identification
8. BvB 3-Bet Range Assessment
9. Thin Value Betting Decision
10. Stack Depth Preflop Adjustment
11. Backdoor Draw Math

Pre-loaded Library folders \(Poker GTO section\):
- GTO Foundations
- Preflop Ranges by Position
- Bet Sizing & Pot Odds
- Range Construction & Blockers
- Postflop Concepts
- Exploitative Deviations
- Blind vs. Blind Strategy
- Scenario Quiz Bank

UI updates:
- Teal badge color for Poker GTO
- Category pill between Game Theory and Stats
- Folders auto-created on first Library load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
